title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the impact of information overload and fake news.

questions.question: Is it the responsibility of tech companies to stop the spread of fake news?
Do you think young people are less interested in world news than older generations?
Is it better to have many biased news sources or one single objective one?

script.text: How can we teach students to distinguish between fact and opinion in the news?
